message:
test: add OAuth provider flow tests + MockHttpResponse import fix

- tests/extensions_provider_oauth.rs: new test file (bd-hz9l) covering
  OAuth config extraction from extension JSON, auth URL construction
  with PKCE, token exchange via mock HTTP server, token refresh, token
  persistence in auth.json, token resolution in provider key path, and
  extension refresh skipping built-in providers
- tests/provider_streaming/anthropic.rs: add MockHttpResponse import
  alongside TestHarness for upcoming streaming test usage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
